name: Handstand Hold

movements.notes: freestanding, within a 4x4 ft box; ends on a hand touching/crossing the box border or foot/head touching the ground; multiple attempts allowed

description: A max-effort freestanding handstand hold within a marked box, ending on a border touch or a foot or head touching the ground.
source_notes: games.crossfit.com/workouts/games/2020/6 (official CrossFit Games event), retrieved 2026-07-09; score is longest single hold duration, not fastest time
